# DATPAQ Convert Time API Sample

This repository contains a production-ready single-page application demonstrating the DATPAQ Convert Time API.

## Primary resources
- Human docs: https://datpaq.com/api/v1/convert-time
- API base URL: https://datpaq.com/api
- API route used by this sample: /v1/convert-time
- OpenAPI schema (machine-readable): /openapi.json
- Expanded LLM guidance: /llms-full.txt

## What this app demonstrates
- Time conversion using source/target IANA timezones.
- Time conversion using source/target location strings.
- Request validation for required values (API key and sourceTime).
- Loading, error, and success response handling.
- Copyable request URL and JSON response output.

## Auth expectations
- Requires an API key in the `x-api-key` request header.

## Query contract (GET /v1/convert-time)
- Required: `sourceTime`
- Source selector: one of `sourceZone` or `sourceLocation`
- Target selector: one of `targetZone` or `targetLocation`

## Output contract
- Successful responses include `success`, `data`, and `meta`.
- Common data fields include `data.sourceTime`, `data.targetTime`, timezone details, and request metadata.
